headline.title: Headline inflation
headline.source: Department of Statistics Malaysia via data.gov.my

core.title: Core inflation
core.source: Department of Statistics Malaysia via data.gov.my

unemployment.title: Unemployment rate
unemployment.source: Department of Statistics Malaysia via data.gov.my

forecast.methodLabel: Pseudo-real-time backtest using conservative release lags

methodology.model: Level on intercept, linear trend, and one-month lag
methodology.confirmation: Classical Chow test with within-indicator Holm correction
methodology.robustness: HAC/Newey-West joint Wald test and full-sample CUSUM

headline.narrative: BIC selected a stable single-regime specification; no structural break candidate is reported. This is evidence of parameter instability, not proof that a nearby event caused the change.

warnings: The level series does not reject a unit root at 5%; level and trend breaks may partly reflect persistence.
core.narrative: The latest supported parameter shift is estimated near 2021-11. The adjacent-regime mean was 1.35 units higher; both the Holm-adjusted Chow and HAC tests are below 5%. This is evidence of parameter instability, not proof that a nearby event caused the change.

warnings: The level series does not reject a unit root at 5%; level and trend breaks may partly reflect persistence.
unemployment.narrative: The latest supported parameter shift is estimated near 2022-04. The adjacent-regime mean was 1.33 units lower; both the Holm-adjusted Chow and HAC tests are below 5%. This is evidence of parameter instability, not proof that a nearby event caused the change.

warnings: The level series does not reject a unit root at 5%; level and trend breaks may partly reflect persistence.
opr.narrative: The latest supported parameter shift is estimated near 2022-05. The adjacent-regime mean was 1.05 units higher; both the Holm-adjusted Chow and HAC tests are below 5%. This is evidence of parameter instability, not proof that a nearby event caused the change.

fx.narrative: The latest supported parameter shift is estimated near 2014-09. The adjacent-regime mean was 0.70 units higher; both the Holm-adjusted Chow and HAC tests are below 5%. This is evidence of parameter instability, not proof that a nearby event caused the change.

warnings: A 12-month minimum regime was required because the available history is short; treat break dates as lower-confidence.
The level series does not reject a unit root at 5%; level and trend breaks may partly reflect persistence.
mgs.narrative: BIC selected a stable single-regime specification; no structural break candidate is reported. This is evidence of parameter instability, not proof that a nearby event caused the change.

narratives.snapshot: Headline inflation eased to 1.9% in the latest release, while core inflation was 1.9%.
narratives.forecast: The selected ARIMAX model places the three-month central forecast at 1.80%. Prediction intervals, rather than the point estimate alone, should guide interpretation.
narratives.financial: Inflation, policy rates, the ringgit and bond yields move together through several channels, but these descriptive relationships are not causal estimates or trading recommendations.
